subtitle.zh: 與 Cloudflare 的第一個 15 分鐘

tagline.en: No servers, no credit card needed — sign up, type a few commands, and put your first app online today.
tagline.zh: 不用伺服器、不用信用卡——註冊、打幾行指令，今天就把你的第一個應用程式放上線。

text.en: Cloudflare is one of the world's largest networks of computers, spread across 330+ cities. Most people know it for making websites faster and safer, but it is also a developer platform — a place where you can write code and run it on that same global network, without ever renting or managing a server yourself.
text.zh: Cloudflare 是全世界最大的電腦網路之一，分布在超過 330 個城市。大家最熟悉的是它能讓網站更快、更安全，但它同時也是一個「開發者平台」（developer platform，給工程師寫程式、跑程式的地方）——你可以在這個遍布全球的網路上寫程式並執行，完全不用自己租或管理伺服器（server，也就是負責處理請求、提供服務的電腦）。

text.en: The idea is called "build on Cloudflare": instead of buying one computer in one location, your code runs close to your users everywhere at once. You bring the code; Cloudflare provides the computers, the storage, the database, and even the AI.
text.zh: 這個概念叫做「在 Cloudflare 上打造（build on Cloudflare）」：你不用買一台放在某個地點的電腦，而是讓你的程式碼在全球各地、離使用者最近的地方同時執行。你只要負責寫程式碼，Cloudflare 幫你準備好運算的電腦、儲存空間、資料庫，甚至是 AI。

text.en: A traditional server is like opening one restaurant in one city — everyone has to travel to you. Cloudflare is like a food truck that instantly appears in 330+ cities at once, so the meal is always served right next to whoever ordered it. You just hand over the recipe (your code); the trucks are already everywhere.
text.zh: 傳統的伺服器就像在某個城市開「一家」餐廳，所有客人都得大老遠跑來找你。Cloudflare 則像一台會瞬間出現在 330 多個城市的餐車，餐點永遠在點餐的人旁邊就做好端上。你只要交出食譜（也就是你的程式碼），餐車早就遍布各地了。

text.en: Your code automatically runs in the city closest to each visitor — no regions to pick.
text.zh: 你的程式碼會自動在離每位訪客最近的城市執行，不用自己選機房或地區。

text.en: 100,000 requests a day for free, no credit card required to begin.
text.zh: 每天有 10 萬次免費請求（request，就是一次造訪或呼叫），開始時也不用綁信用卡。

text.en: Compute, storage, databases, and AI all live on the same platform.
text.zh: 運算、儲存、資料庫和 AI 全都在同一個平台裡，不用東拼西湊。

heading.zh: 第一步：開一個免費帳號

text.en: Everything below needs a Cloudflare account. The good news: it is free, takes about a minute, and does not ask for a credit card to get started.
text.zh: 底下所有步驟都需要一個 Cloudflare 帳號。好消息是：它免費、大約一分鐘就好，而且一開始不需要信用卡。

text.en: Go to dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up in your browser. This is the Cloudflare Dashboard — the website where you manage everything by clicking.
text.zh: 在瀏覽器打開 dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up。這就是 Cloudflare 的「控制台」（Dashboard，用滑鼠點一點就能管理所有東西的網頁後台）。

text.en: Type an email address and a strong password, then submit. Use a real inbox you can open.
text.zh: 填入電子郵件和一組夠強的密碼後送出。請用一個你打得開的真實信箱。

text.en: Cloudflare emails you a verification link. Click it to confirm the account is yours.
text.zh: Cloudflare 會寄一封含「驗證連結」的信給你，點一下確認這個帳號是你的。

text.en: You now see the dashboard. You do NOT need to add a website or domain to follow this lesson — the free Workers plan works on its own.
text.zh: 現在你會看到控制台畫面。要跟著本課程做，你「不需要」先加入網站或網域（domain，像 example.com 這種網址）——免費的 Workers 方案本身就能用。

text.en: In account settings, enable two-factor authentication (a second code on login). It is a one-minute habit that keeps your projects safe.
text.zh: 在帳號設定裡開啟「兩步驟驗證」（two-factor，登入時要再輸入一組臨時代碼）。花一分鐘養成這個習慣，就能讓你的專案更安全。

text.en: Wrangler is Cloudflare's command-line tool (CLI) — a program you type commands into, in the terminal, to build and deploy your code. The dashboard is for clicking; Wrangler is for shipping.
text.zh: Wrangler 是 Cloudflare 的「命令列工具」（CLI，Command-Line Interface，一種用打字輸入指令來操作的程式）——你在「終端機」（terminal，輸入文字指令的黑色視窗）裡打指令，就能建置與部署你的程式碼。控制台用來點一點，Wrangler 則用來把成品送上線。

text.en: Wrangler runs on Node.js (a tool for running JavaScript on your computer). Install Node.js 18 or newer from nodejs.org first. Check it worked by running: node -v
text.zh: Wrangler 需要 Node.js（一個能在你電腦上執行 JavaScript 的工具）。請先到 nodejs.org 安裝 Node.js 18 或更新的版本。安裝後在終端機輸入 node -v 確認有裝好。

text.en: Run this in your terminal. The -g means "install globally" so you can use the wrangler command anywhere.
text.zh: 在終端機輸入下面這行。-g 代表「全域安裝」，這樣你在任何資料夾都能使用 wrangler 指令。

text.en: This opens your browser and asks you to allow Wrangler to use your account. Click Allow, then return to the terminal — it now knows who you are.
text.zh: 這會打開瀏覽器，問你是否允許 Wrangler 使用你的帳號。點「Allow（允許）」後回到終端機，它就認得你了。

text.en: This prints the email of the logged-in account. If you see your email, you are ready for the next step.
text.zh: 這會印出目前登入帳號的電子郵件。看到你的信箱，就代表可以進到下一步了。

heading.zh: 第三步：部署你的第一個 Worker

text.en: A Worker is a small piece of code that runs on Cloudflare's network and responds to web requests. Let's create one and put it live on the internet — for real.
text.zh: 「Worker」是一段小小的程式碼，跑在 Cloudflare 的網路上，負責回應網頁請求。我們現在就來建立一個，並把它真正放上網路。

text.en: This command (called C3) scaffolds a ready-to-run project in a new folder named my-first-worker. It will ask a few questions — see the next step.
text.zh: 這個指令（叫做 C3）會在一個名為 my-first-worker 的新資料夾裡，幫你建好一個可以馬上執行的專案範本。它會問你幾個問題，請看下一步。

text.en: When asked what to start with, choose "Hello World example". For the template, pick "Worker only", and for the language pick "JavaScript". Say no to deploying for now — we'll do it ourselves.
text.zh: 當它問你要從什麼開始，選「Hello World example（範例）」；範本選「Worker only（只要 Worker）」；語言選「JavaScript」。問你要不要現在部署時先選「否」，我們等一下自己來部署。

title.zh: 看看產生出來的程式碼

text.en: Open the new folder. Inside src/index.js you'll find the Worker below. The fetch function runs every time someone visits, and it returns a Response — the page they see.
text.zh: 打開新資料夾，在 src/index.js 裡會看到下面這段 Worker。每次有人造訪，fetch 這個函式就會執行，並回傳一個 Response（回應，也就是訪客看到的內容）。

text.en: Run this from inside the project folder. Wrangler uploads your Worker and gives you a public URL like my-first-worker.<your-name>.workers.dev. Open it in a browser — that's your code running live.
text.zh: 在專案資料夾裡執行這行。Wrangler 會把你的 Worker 上傳，並給你一個公開網址，像是 my-first-worker.<你的名稱>.workers.dev。用瀏覽器打開它——那就是你的程式碼正在線上運作了。

text.en: Change "Hello World!" to any text, save the file, and run npx wrangler deploy again. Refresh the URL to see your update go global in seconds.
text.zh: 把 "Hello World!" 改成任何文字，存檔後再執行一次 npx wrangler deploy。重新整理網址，就能看到你的改動在幾秒內傳遍全球。

text.en: A Worker on its own is powerful, but real apps need to remember things, store files, and sometimes think. Here's where to go next — each is its own lesson on this site.
text.zh: 光是一個 Worker 就很強大，但真正的應用程式還需要「記住資料」「存放檔案」，有時還要會「思考」。下面是你接下來可以學的方向——每一個在本站都有專屬課程。

text.en: Workers KV is a simple key-value store, like a giant sticky-note board for settings, counters, and flags.
text.zh: Workers KV 是簡單的「鍵值資料庫」（key-value，用一個名稱對應一份資料），就像一面巨大的便利貼牆，存設定、計數器、開關都很合適。

text.en: R2 holds big files like images, videos, and backups — with no fees for downloading them out.
text.zh: R2 用來存放大型檔案，像圖片、影片、備份——而且把檔案下載出去不收「流量費」。

text.en: D1 is a real SQL database for structured data like users and orders, built right into the platform.
text.zh: D1 是內建在平台裡的真正 SQL 資料庫，適合存有結構的資料，例如使用者、訂單。

text.en: Workers AI runs ready-made AI models (chat, images, translation) from inside your Worker with one call.
text.zh: Workers AI 讓你在 Worker 裡用一行呼叫，就能跑現成的 AI 模型（聊天、生圖、翻譯等）。

text.en: Explore the WAF, Turnstile, and Access to block bad traffic and protect your apps as they grow.
text.zh: 認識 WAF（網站防火牆）、Turnstile（友善的真人驗證）與 Access（存取控管），擋掉惡意流量、隨著成長保護你的應用程式。

text.en: The official Cloudflare docs have copy-paste examples for every product. Bookmark them — you'll come back often.
text.zh: Cloudflare 官方文件對每個產品都有可直接複製貼上的範例。把它加到書籤，你會常回來查。

text.en: You can learn nearly everything on the free tier. Build tiny projects, break things, and only think about paying once a real project gets real traffic.
text.zh: 幾乎所有東西都能在免費額度內學會。先做小專案、放心去試錯，等到真的有專案、有大量流量時，再考慮付費就好。

en: Use the free tier first — 100,000 requests/day is plenty for learning and side projects.
Dashboard vs CLI: click around the dashboard to explore, but use Wrangler when you want repeatable, scriptable deploys.
Run npx wrangler dev to test your Worker locally before deploying — it's fast and free.
When stuck, read the official docs first; almost every page has a working copy-paste example.
Commit your project to Git early so you can always undo a change.
Each Worker gets a free .workers.dev URL — great for sharing demos without buying a domain.
zh: 先用免費額度——每天 10 萬次請求，學習和個人小專案綽綽有餘。
控制台 vs CLI：用控制台點一點來探索功能，但想要可重複、可寫成腳本的部署時就用 Wrangler。
部署前先用 npx wrangler dev 在本機測試你的 Worker——又快又不花錢。
卡關時先讀官方文件；幾乎每一頁都有可直接複製貼上、能跑的範例。
盡早把專案用 Git 版本控制起來，這樣隨時都能還原改動。
每個 Worker 都有免費的 .workers.dev 網址——不用買網域就能分享你的成果。
